channel.title: Create FortiGate VMs :: SE How-To Build Lab
channel.description: If you get the error No route to host with any of the following steps, use the Troubleshoot Ansible steps Copy Bootstrap ISO’s, Create VM’s, Start VM’s ​ from Terminal in OOB cd /home/fortinet/automation/ansible/fortinet ​ Continuing from Terminal in OOB Copy bootstrap ISO’s to Proxmox server ./copy_fgt_bootstrap_iso.sh ../vars/all-hosts.yml <PVE server name> ​ Continuing from Terminal in OOB Create the FGT VM’s on Proxmox ./create-vm.sh ../vars/all-hosts.yml <PVE server name> fortigate_sdwan v7.6.6.M ​ Continuing from Terminal in OOB Start the VM’s just created ./start_remove_vm.sh ../vars/all-hosts.yml <PVE server name> fortigate_sdwan started
